title: Reset a forgotten password
text: If you've forgotten your password, open the app or website and tap "Forgot password" on the sign-in screen. Enter the email address on your account and we'll send a reset link that stays valid for 30 minutes. Choose a new password you haven't used before, then sign in again. If the email doesn't arrive within a few minutes, check your spam folder and confirm you used the address registered to the account.
